review_title: From Virtual Presentations to Tech Innovations: My Journey with NVIDIA GPU Cloud
description: I used NVIDIA GPU Cloud (NGC) in my virtual classes, and did it help with my presentations! Honestly, I'm not much of a talker, so any assistance is appreciated. NVIDIA never ceases to amaze me with what they roll out. I'm always on the lookout for their next big thing because, seriously, their stuff is always worth it.
author: Daniel C.
pros: I've honestly been blown away by NVIDIA GPU Cloud (NGC). It's super handy, and you can tell it's keeping up with the latest tech. One thing I especially liked was how, in situations like interviews or conferences, the system just makes things easier for you. If you've ever tried to read something while attempting to maintain eye contact with the camera, you'll know what I mean. Thanks to its AI, NGC takes care of that, making you feel more at ease and everything just flows better. You genuinely feel like the tech is working for you, not the other way around.
cons: What I would have loved about NVIDIA GPU Cloud (NGC) is if it was a bit more friendly to mid-range PCs. I know a few folks who'd be keen to try it out, but their computers just don't meet the mark. Of course, tech is always pushing forward, but not everyone has a top-notch PC at home. It'd be great if, in the future, it could be more inclusive for everyone.

description: Overall experience is amazing & we are new to GPU cloud and every day we are learning a lot. Some new issues which even NVIDIA also sees first time.
author: infant R.
pros: We have created our first AI GPU cloud using the NVIDIA A100 DGX machines which have very high network bandwidth. All the necessary packages required can be easily pulled from the NGC by our data scientists which reduces their time in making unnecessary extra configurations
cons: Since it is very new technology , no clear documents or blogs available in internet.NVIDIA support team is taking a bit longer time for any cases logged & there should be some clear documentation required. Equal distribution of workloads to all GPU's for a instance needs to be improved.

author: Dag B.
pros: Enhance unlimited on-demand computing: Virtual machines, now available anywhere at any time, can be scaled up or down as needed. Collect system log files automatically !.Easy UpdatesThe latest hardware, software, and services are just a click away. Collect its logs if the machines have critical or error encountered!Flexible PricingFree trials, a wide range of pricing and leasing options are available.This is not open to everyone. Please improve this!
cons: Artificial intelligence is not improved or at least more sophisticated and the problem is also that when it does not solve the problem. So why don't you collect more diagnosis from your side?
author_duration: Used the software for: I used a free trial

review_title: High-performance NVIDIA GPU Cloud at your fingertips
description: Overall, NGC excels as a specialized tool for deep learning tasks. It feels like having a high-performance supercomputer at your fingertips, a beast at tackling complex neural networks However, NGC is laser-focused on GPU processing. If you need a more general-purpose cloud platform with broader services like storage or databases, you might need to look elsewhere. For this reason, it will leave holes in your pockets.
author: PHYLLIS WANJIKU G.
pros: Best at accessing powerful NVIDIA GPUs in the cloud, significantly accelerating workflows and training times for large projects.
cons: It has fewer services and has higher costs compared to other cloud providers which could be a drawback for developers needing a more comprehensive solution.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

description: Easy to use, still a little buggy but its great.
author: keith O.
pros: You can work on various ai without paying for all the equipment.
cons: Nothing, a little buggy but they have a great base to work with.
author_duration: Used the software for: I used a free trial

description: I've been using a Nvidia Gtx 1050 for about 1-2 years now and it has been an amazing experience being able to play the games I have wanted to including the fact that even though new games are coming out, I've been able to still play them without any problems.
author: Tommy N.
pros: -Provides amazing + well known GPUs -Allows AI software to provide support
cons: -Depending on the GPU you obtain or have would evaluate your gaming experience

description: The overall experience was good. As a researcher who uses GPUs to accelerate small kernels with hardware resources, I can easily access and run applications. However, a lot of legacy code written in OpenCL, and software controlled hardware (e.g. changing thread counts for an applications due to scaling), cannot be easily ported or run.
author: Verified Reviewer
pros: Ability to use GPUs online. Multiple GPUs can be utilized at a given time. Access to AI software, training and evaluation can be done quickly for neural networks.
cons: Some GPU hardware access is restricted. Legacy softwares mainly not supported. OpenCL not supported much.

review_title: Great tool if you know how to use it
author: Matthew B.
pros: NGC has alot going on if you're developing on an Nvidia platform. It works sort of like GitHub - but it's nvidia specific API's.
cons: It's over my head - so being able to try it out was important. I'm sure it's great for someone out there though. I'll stick to GitHub for when I need to source some type of code.
author_duration: Used the software for: I used a free trial

author: Chad A.
pros: Frequent updates for drivers keep the software bug free. Great performance in gaming and relatively easy to use.
cons: Takes a while to start and a little pricey to use.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

description: Has been beneficial to all computers in my office. Easy to use and adds value to each station.
author: Verified Reviewer
pros: You don't need to be a professional or expert to use this software.
cons: Feels limiting and missing tools to assist with computer based issues. Needs more links.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: vasta gamma di risorse e strumenti per i professionisti dell'apprendimento automatico e l'intelligen
description: Nvidia GPU Cloud è una piattaforma potente e ricca di risorse per gli esperti di machine learning e intelligenza artificiale. Con la sua vasta selezione di framework e modelli preaddestrati, Docker containers preconfigurati e strumenti di distribuzione dei carichi di lavoro, NGC semplifica notevolmente il processo di sviluppo e implementazione di progetti di apprendimento automatico. Nonostante l'abbonamento a pagamento, consiglio vivamente NGC a chiunque sia seriamente interessato ad approfondire questi argomenti.
author: Simone D.
pros: NGC offre un'ampia scelta di container Docker preconfigurati, contenenti sia i framework di deep learning che le librerie e gli strumenti necessari per eseguire l'apprendimento automatico su GPU. Questo consente agli utenti di creare facilmente ambienti di sviluppo replicabili e portatili, migliorando la collaborazione e la condivisione di progetti tra i membri del team.
cons: NGC richiede l'utilizzo di una sottoscrizione a pagamento per accedere a molte delle risorse offerte. Sebbene ci siano alcune risorse gratuite disponibili, l'accesso completo a tutta la libreria di modelli e framework richiede un abbonamento.

description: With NGC I always have a wonderful experience as the program is graceful and simple to use. The strength of graphics and media display are good.
author: JOSH G.
pros: NGC is a great company that offers a great quality product. The software is very powerful and wonderful for media and computer technology. NVIDIA has a very useful and courteous interface that is adaptive that is great with Windows PC and MAC.
cons: I don't like some how the program and some features seem basic and beginner for a graphics software program.

description: Buena es muy fluida pero se necesita conocimientos básicos, para su buen uso
